reviews.review_description: Basically Walkabout Mini Golf but with a frisbee, and aliens. It’s a little hard to get the hang of throwing the disc at first, but once you do it’s addicting to nail those shots. The maps are varied and all have their unique interesting twist. Fun game!
I played all the disc golf games and I had to say that this is most accurate and actually fun disc golf game makes me think of like disc golf walkabout ￼

developer_response.body: Appreciate it, and glad your enjoying it!

reviews.review_description: do not waste your money on this game ,there are zalmost no maps and way overpriced for how much effort was put into this horrid replacement for frisbee golf.

developer_response.body:
Sorry you had a bad experience!

Just to clarify for anyone reading: the game currently includes 8 maps (130+ holes) and 150+ disc customization options.

If you only saw a small amount of content, it may not have finished downloading or you may have been in the wrong menu, try restarting the headset and re-opening the game, then check the Levels selection. If you’re still stuck, reach out and I’ll help you get into the full content.

reviews.review_description: Always wanted to play disk golf, physics are very well done, courses are extremely creative

developer_response.body: Thank you, glad you're enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description: My first VR disc golf game and it's a blast! A ton of fun to play.

developer_response.body: Thank you! Glad you're enjoying the game and happy disc golfing! 🥏

reviews.review_description:
It looks good and the throwing seems ok, but I bought it for multiplayer and it doesn't seem to work for us.  The microphones aren't working, so we can't hear each other.  We never got to finish even one hole because the room kept closing.  We really wanted to like this game, but unless the devs have some ideas how to fix our problem, we will be getting a refund.

Edit:  We got the microphones working and tried another game on a different course with the same results.  We each threw a disc one time and the room closed.

Update 1: Raised the review to 3 stars based on the developer getting back to me immediately and is working on the multiplayer issue.  I will update again when it is fixed.

Update 2:  4 stars now.  The multiplayer issue has been fixed.  Kudos to the developer for working on it and getting it working
Having a blast playing this game and the devs are really fast to respond.
This game surpassed my expectations for vr disc golf! Its like walkabout mini golf but with discs and baskets! I would like to see more maps in the future!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the comments, glad your enjoying the game! Working on polishing a few things up currently, but we are looking forward to adding new levels in the future!

reviews.review_description: I’m having a lot of fun playing VR disc golf. Solo or with friends. It comes with 7 Very different and unique courses.

Edit: The developers have done a few updates to improve the throwing and also added a whole new beach map! The new map is really pretty and not as flat so its a lot harder but it's my new favourite map - lots of little detail and each hole feels unique. What makes this game so fun to play is there's no single path to get to a hole, you do a throw and you're playing from that next spot (unless it lands in the water). So you need to adapt to your new location and you spot details you didn't notice before or knew the map had. I'd really love to see some customization where you could modify a map to create a variation where you put the holes in different places and then play your customised map with your friends, but they're still working on improving it. 

Also their tiktoks and YouTube videos are really cute, I love indie couple game developers! Highly recommend this especially if you're on the fence especially when there's a sale on because this could be the next walk about mini golf

Original:
Feels really great to play the gameplay is refined and perfect. Don't worry if you suck at throwing Frisbees in real life this is more forgiving but still fantastically simulated physics. Reminds me a lot of walk about minigolf, clearly an inspiration. Has teleport and full locomotion controls and the level design is great and while the lighting could be better the scenery is delightfully crafted. You reach over your shoulder and grab to get a disc - which took me a little too long to figure out but the devs are actively working on the game (they fixed a few things I pointed out the next day on discord! indie developers rock!)  - this could be the next walk about minigolf. I love the physics of the chains when the disc hits the goal its just like the real thing! I love that the hands have 3 fingers and you're an alien it makes sense with how the quest controller works while giving a nice theme to the game. Pick it up while it's on sale!

I LOVE in-real-life disc golf, and play regularly. This VR simulation, however, is frustratingly in-accurate. No matter what disc, no matter what adjustments I make to disc angle, disc mechanics, turn off wind entirely, etc, my throws are just… wildly inaccurate.  In practice mode, with no wind, if i stand in exactly the same place, and do the same motion, I get wildly different shot placements, and they’re all WRONG: that was NOT what I was aiming for!
I’m on a Quest 3 with up-to-date firmware, and it’s as if it’s losing tracking on the hand with the disc during the windup when my hand is offscreen, and then correcting once the hand enters the view of the headset, with totally unpredictable results. 
I can only hit the basket when standing 3 feet away from it: every other throw is randomly too long, too short, funny angle, weird release point. My room lighting is correct, my controllers are full battery, tracking is 100%, just the physics model for the release point of the throw is… random. I can’t even manage to correct for my wonkiness : it’s a randomly different inaccuracy every.single.throw. 
Whatever is wrong with the physics model, I can’t throw with any reproducibility whatsoever. Since it’s disc golf, accuracy is the only thing that matters: that’s 99% of the game right there. 
Tldr: I’d say, hold off on purchasing until the physics flight model is corrected to allow for decent reproducibility of your shots. Today, it’s just too frustrating: I don’t know what I’m missing in the mechanics, but I play IRL disc golf at a 7/10 level today, and I can barely play at a 2/10 level in this simulation. Just super frustrating. I’ll not ask for a refund, because I want to support Indie devs, but I paid $14 for 15 minutes of annoyance, and had to put it down. Hope it’ll get better, but it’s currently unplayably frustrating for me in its current state on 12/1/2024.

developer_response.body:
Sorry you're having these issues! We aim for the most realistic disc physics possible, basing them on research papers about disc flight to get them as accurate as we can.

**UPDATE:  If you get a chance - check out the update! I reworked how the throwing / release logic is handled - would love to know if it improved accuracy / reproducibility!

But, everyone's experience can vary and clearly somethings not working for you. If you're open to it, we'd appreciate it if you could join our Discord community https://discord.gg/DhWBJe3Eys . Sharing some gameplay recordings would be super helpful for us to see exactly what's happening and work towards a solution.

Also, I wanted to mention a couple of in-game options that might help the throwing experience:
 - Hold/Release with Trigger Button: You can use the trigger button to hold and release the disc, which some players find offers better control. This option is in the Player Settings under the settings icon.
    - Adjust Disc Grip Angles: Under the Hand Options, there's an option to change the disc grip angles. Tweaking these settings might make throwing feel more natural and align better with your real-life technique.

Appreciate the support, and hopefully we can get this feeling more accurate for you!

reviews.review_description: I've tried all the disc golf games on Quest and SteamVR and this one definitely has the best physics and feeling of polish. The level of customization you get when creating your own discs is really impressive and the devs have been super responsive and quick to integrate feedback. Do yourself a favor and pick this one up. If you're a fan of disc golf, you won't regret it!

Not only are the physics spot on, but the levels are incredibly creative and challenging. There’s 1-2 easier courses but there’s a couple which are super difficult.  I was around during the testing and it’s only gotten better as time has progressed…  the developer is incredibly friendly and responsive to ideas… there were times I made a suggestion and it was literally updated the following the day with that change. Can’t ask for better customer service than that lol. 

I’ve tried every single VR frisbee golf game offered on the meta store and quite simply, Disc Frenzy blows them all out of the water. 
There’s a real in depth disc maker as well. Before, every upgrade/style/design were selectable from the start, but the newest update makes it so you gotta earn/unlock those attributes… every hole you par unlocks a new attribute, so you gotta par every hole in the game to unlock it all. 

Trust me when I say you won’t regret purchasing Disc Frenzy.  This is easily one of the top 5 multiplayer games I’ve played on Quest.  

Tip: try the space course first… easily my favorite so far

I've had so much fun playing this game even when I was just starting out and hitting every tree in typical disc golf fashion, but after playing each course a couple time I've gotten quite good at this game! I'm even getting EAGLES!! 

The throwing feels very responsive and accurate to what I would expect. This is also the only game I've played that has a disc edit station allowing you to build discs with actual glide, speed, fade & turn that all affect the way that disc will fly. This feature is what sets apart this game in my opinion.

I have been really enjoying this game. And I think it’s worth to have in your library. 

- Unique worlds with attention to detail
- Realistic throwing makes the game technical
- Unlock customization options and create your own discs

You can also play online with friends!

reviews.review_title: Best simulated disc golf on the market!
reviews.review_description: As an avid disc golfer I hated being reduced to only playing when weather allows, now that I've found disc Frenzy I can grind all year around, definitely recommend to all my fellow discers!
